title: Red Shoes and the Seven Dwarfs
posterAlt: Red Shoes and the Seven Dwarfs (2019) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Princes who have been turned into Dwarfs seek the red shoes of a lady in order to break the spell, although it will not be easy.
synopsis: Released in 2019, Red Shoes and the Seven Dwarfs is a animation, fantasy and family film from South Korea. It carries a 6.5 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a PG certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
